notes.title: Using @Weekday
notes.description: Calculates how many days left till the weekend. Returns 'Working on the Weekend!' if today is Saturday or Sunday. Returns 'TGIF' if today is Friday.

notes.title: Using @Abs
notes.description: Returns the absolute value for -2 using Notes Formula.

notes.title: Using @BusinessDays
notes.description: Returns the number of business days in one year. Excludes Sundays (1) and Saturdays (7).

notes.title: Using @Contains
notes.description: Determines whether 'Hill' or 'Pane' are stored within the names list.

notes.title: Using @Replace
notes.description: Performs a find-and-replace operation on the text list. Items not found are returned unaltered.

notes.title: Using @Elements
notes.description: Calculates the number values in SalesForce. This function always returns the number of entries in the list.

openFormula.title: Using =ABS
openFormula.description: Returns the absolute value for -1 using openFormula.

custom.title: Using @Debug
custom.description: Uses the console object's methods to display Debug messages, prepending them with a timestamp.

custom.title: Using @Context
custom.description: Gets or Sets the API context to either database ('db'), local DOM ('local'), or both ('all') for those APIs that require working with differents contexts such as GetField/SetField.

custom.title: Using @RestfulAPI
custom.description: "RestfulAPI" is a generic RESTful API that allows users to interact with any REST endpoint by providing configurable parameters such as the endpoint URL, HTTP method (e.g., GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), headers, request body, and additional request parameters.
